purpose_context: Land Slice A (charter freshness UX: #1099, #1100, #1101, #1104) and the Slice F authoring-vocabulary gap (#1291) of epic #1111 in a single mission, and unify the doctrine vocabulary by renaming the user-facing layer label `shipped` to `built-in` consistently across code, tests, JSON surfaces, and documentation. Bundled because both slices touch the same charter CLI surfaces and the doctrine schema/validator pipeline; landing them together avoids merge conflicts and keeps the 3.2.0 release contract coherent.
purpose_tldr: Charter freshness UX + first-class `overrides`/`enhances` schema fields + `shipped→built-in` rename, shipped as one coherent doctrine release cut.
source_description: Bundle of slices A & F of epic #1111 plus the `shipped→built-in` vocabulary unification.
